remaining_tasks.name: Bulleted committee-roster pattern fixed (PR #185, 1044be1)
remaining_tasks.note: item_502.py now normalizes bullet markers to sentence breaks in _text() before parsing; PARSER_VERSION 3->4; regression test added using the Horizon Kinetics filing (0000950170-24-098502, CIK 88000). Verified this fixes the exact accession that failed production.

remaining_tasks.name: Refined 2,000-sample scope check: gap is 6+ distinct patterns, not one
remaining_tasks.note: unresolved 211/2000 (10.6%), 95% CI 9.2-12.0%, projecting ~640-834 across the full freeze. The bullet fix did not move this number (none of the 2,000 sampled unresolved cases were the bullet pattern). Trigger-lemma breakdown (share of full 2,000 sample, one doc can trigger >1 lemma): appoint 104 (~5.2%, sub-patterns: backward-references to prior Form 8-Ks, appositive names where dobj is a common noun like 'son'), join 71 (~3.55%, biographical background prose unrelated to the disclosed event), terminate 62 (~3.1%, conditional/hypothetical agreement boilerplate not caught by _is_hypothetical), elect 23 (~1.15%), name 18 (~0.9%, 'Named Executive Officer' defined-term heading mistagged as a verb), resign 16 (~0.8%), promote 12 (~0.6%, 'promoted to [ROLE]' direct pattern not recognized by _find_role), plus small tails. Backward-reference and bio-background sub-patterns are semantic judgment calls -- getting them wrong risks false-positive relationships in production MDM data, not just under-counting. Awaiting user prioritization on which patterns to fix next.

blockers.name: Item 5.02 parser cannot resolve ~10.6% of required candidates (6+ distinct patterns, bullet-list sub-pattern already fixed)
blockers.detail: edgar_warehouse/parsers/item_502.py:519 returns Item502Result('unresolved', 'unclassified_named_event', ()) when an appointment/departure verb is found in a non-boilerplate sentence but no structured event can be extracted. fundamentals_ingest.py:213 hard-raises on this under release_mode. Refined 2,000-sample scope check: 10.6% unresolved, ~640-834 candidates projected across the 6,952-candidate freeze, spread across appoint (~5.2%: backward-references + appositive names), join (~3.55%: bio-background prose), terminate (~3.1%: conditional agreement boilerplate), plus smaller name/promote/elect/resign patterns. No repair/override path exists today; per-accession manual override is not viable at this scale for the remaining patterns either.

context_notes: Grok handed Ticket 20 GO prep to Claude. Claude completed all prep, obtained attestations, and fired the strict production execution with explicit user go-ahead. Execution ran ~50 min then failed on a genuine data-quality gate (unresolved Item 5.02 candidate), not an infra issue. Fixed the specific bullet-list pattern that caused the failure (PR #185), then ran a bigger 2,000-sample scope check which revealed the aggregate gap is actually 6+ distinct root causes at ~10.6%, several of which are semantic judgment calls (false-positive risk, not just under-counting) -- user prioritization needed before continuing.
